calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-06-2011 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-06-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ellen Chaitin; Clerk: SRavinantapricha/D. Hakewill; Not Reported. (D514)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Miguel Pena is present.
Attorney Steven Adair appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Francisca Romero is present.
Attorney Philip O'Brien representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Jim Watson, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

This case settled, the trial date of OCT-11-2011 is vacated.

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-23-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT FRANCISCA ROMERO'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR. FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED ON JULY 27, 2011. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter, Carol A. Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
